title: cameraria obovalis
intro: Cameraria obovalis, also known as the leafy spurge or froghell, is a plant species belonging to the family Celastraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions, fever, and respiratory issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. Cameraria obovalis is valued for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and treating wounds. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
